name: @noem/platform-keystore
description: TPM-backed hardware key storage for Node — provision non-exportable keys and seal/unseal secrets via the Windows NCrypt Platform KSP

scripts.build: napi build --platform --release -o dist --js index.cjs --dts index.d.cts && napi build --platform --release --esm -o dist --js index.js --dts index.d.ts
scripts.build:ci: napi build --platform --release --target $TARGET -o dist --js index.cjs --dts index.d.cts && napi build --platform --release --esm --target $TARGET -o dist --js index.js --dts index.d.ts
scripts.dev: napi build --platform -o dist --js index.cjs --dts index.d.cts && napi build --platform --esm -o dist --js index.js --dts index.d.ts
scripts.test: vitest run && cargo llvm-cov --html --output-dir coverage && cargo llvm-cov
scripts.lint: biome check . && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write . && cargo fmt && cargo clippy --fix --allow-dirty
